demo.title: megapot-tickets.sh
demo.code:
# Check the live jackpot
bankr prompt "Using the megapot-tickets skill, how big is the megapot jackpot?"

# Buy 2 quick-pick (random) tickets
bankr prompt "Using the megapot-tickets skill, buy 2 megapot tickets"

# Buy a custom-number ticket (validated against live ball ranges)
bankr prompt "Using the megapot-tickets skill, buy a megapot ticket with numbers 4 8 15 16 23 + 7"

# Gift a ticket to another wallet, ENS, or X handle
bankr prompt "Using the megapot-tickets skill, buy a megapot ticket for @friend"

# Claim any winnings
bankr prompt "Using the megapot-tickets skill, claim my megapot winnings"

setup: Requires the [bankr skill](https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/bankr) for wallet signing and submission on Base (chain ID `8453`)
Fund the wallet with USDC for tickets ($1 each) plus a small amount of ETH for gas
Contract addresses and ABIs are verified live against https://llms.megapot.io
